response.step_by_step_log: I watched the video and identified that it is a performance by Nanashi Mumei. I attempted to search for the lyrics in Japanese, but the search did not return a match, suggesting it may be an original song or a very obscure cover. As a result, the song title and lyrics could not be confirmed. I have populated the JSON with the information I could identify.
response.global_summary: A performance video featuring VTuber Nanashi Mumei singing an unknown Japanese song in a staged, virtual environment, followed by credits.

scenes.description: Nanashi Mumei performs a Japanese song in a virtual stage setting.
